_doc: Asset catalog stub for map manifests. Maps asset keys to placeholder mesh descriptions. Real meshes follow in a later pass. Referenced by NEW-9 spawner and NEW-10 map manifests.

base_core.description: Team base structure — the main building players defend and return flags to.

flag_stand.description: Flag stand — the objective point where the team flag rests when at home.

spawn_pad.description: Spawn pad — the platform where players respawn after death.

tower_a.description: Tall defensive tower — provides elevated sniping position and line-of-sight control.

tower_b.description: Medium defensive tower — shorter than tower_a, wider base for cover.

cover_rock_a.description: Large rock formation — natural cover for players on foot.

cover_rock_b.description: Medium rock — smaller cover piece for mid-range engagements.

cover_wall_a.description: Low wall — directional cover, blocks line-of-sight from one angle.

inventory_station.description: Inventory station — replenishes player ammo and equipment.

generator.description: Power generator — destroyable structure that powers base defenses.

sensor.description: Sensor array — detects enemy movement in a radius; destroyable.

turret_base.description: Auto-turret base — fires at nearby enemies; destroyable.

decor_crate_a.description: Decorative crate — visual dressing, no gameplay function.

decor_barrel_a.description: Decorative barrel — visual dressing, no gameplay function.

ski_ramp_a.description: Ski ramp — angled surface that accelerates skiing players.

ski_ramp_b.description: Smaller ski ramp — shallower angle, for mid-speed approach.

mesa_edge_marker.description: Mesa edge marker — visual indicator of mesa cliff edge.

ridge_crest_marker.description: Ridge crest marker — visual indicator of ridge high point.
